cards.label: Entity extraction
cards.caveat: Does not measure implicit or name-only entity recognition.

cards.label: Knowledge graph
cards.detail: 11 entity types · 17 directed schema links · zero broken endpoints
cards.caveat: Validated against the locked ontology; no duplicate or schema-invalid edges.

cards.label: Answer quality
cards.caveat: Automated rubric results are not a substitute for domain-expert scoring.

cards.label: Compliance → failure
cards.detail: 15 of 171 linked deviations · high sample confidence
cards.caveat: Cohorts are deviations on coils with tests linked to the named failed-standard family. Timing uses date_flagged and the explicitly enriched failure_id_fk. Rates are descriptive, not causal.

cards.label: Time to answer
cards.detail: Existing baseline: 26.35s simple graph; 63.12s degraded RCA route. Controlled n=3 rerun pending.
cards.caveat: Seconds, not instant search; comparison to manual cross-system work has not been experimentally measured.

cards.label: Real-data provenance
cards.detail: Steel Plates Faults: 1,941 rows · Steel Industry Energy: 35,040 rows
cards.caveat: AI4I 2020 is not ingested; AI4I-shaped sensor values remain synthetic.

answer_cases.question: What caused failure F1186, what procedure gap contributed, and what should Maintenance do next?
Which equipment produced coil C10234, and what is the operational implication?
What does IS 2062 cover, what risk does non-compliance create, and what should QA verify?
